methods.method_name: photographed using an Olympus TG-4 waterproof digital camera
dried for molecular analyses using silica gel
sectioned using a bench-top freezing microtome
stained with 1% aniline blue acidified with 1% HCl
photographed under a microscope using an EOS 600D digital camera
edited for clarity using Adobe Photoshop software

environments.environment_name: depths of 8-15 m in subtidal areas around four annexed islets (Hyeongjeseom, Munseom, Seopseom, and Udo) of Jeju Island, Korea
